recommendations.title: Night of the Demons
recommendations.overview: Angela is throwing a decadent Halloween party at New Orleans' infamous Broussard Mansion. But after the police break up the festivities, Maddie and a few friends stay behind. Trapped inside the locked mansion gates, the remaining guests uncover a hor

recommendations.title: Soft & Quiet
recommendations.overview: Taking place in real time, elementary school teacher Emily organizes a mixer of like-minded women, but an altercation between a woman from Emily’s past and the group leads to a volatile chain of events.

recommendations.title: Toolbox Murders
recommendations.overview: A historic Hollywood hotel houses a supernatural evil. It's been subdued for decades, but when renovations start, a series of murders take place.

recommendations.title: Tales of Halloween
recommendations.overview: Ten stories from horror's top directors. Ghosts, ghouls, monsters, and the devil delight in terrorizing unsuspecting residents of a suburban neighborhood on Halloween night. This creepy anthology combines classic Halloween tales with the stuff of nig
recommendations.director: Axelle Carolyn, Paul Solet, Mike Mendez, Lucky McKee, Ryan Schifrin, John Skipp, Neil Marshall, Darren Lynn Bousman, Adam Gierasch, Andrew Kasch, Dave Parker

recommendations.title: KM 31: Kilometer 31
recommendations.overview: While driving through the kilometer 31 of a lonely road, Agata Hameran hits a boy. She leaves her car to help the victim and another car runs over her and she falls in a deep coma. Her twin sister Catalina telepathically feels the pain of Agata and h

recommendations.title: Mortuary
recommendations.overview: A family moves to a small California town where they plan on starting a new life running a long-abandoned funeral home. The locals fear the place, suspected to be on haunted ground.

recommendations.title: Maneater
recommendations.overview: A group of friends on vacation in a seeming island paradise are stalked by an unrelenting great white after an accident leaves them stranded and left for dead.

recommendations.title: Missing
recommendations.overview: When her mother disappears while on vacation in Colombia with her new boyfriend, June’s search for answers is hindered by international red tape. Stuck thousands of miles away in Los Angeles, June creatively uses all the latest technology at her fing

recommendations.title: The Bayou
recommendations.overview: Vacation turns disaster when Houston grad Kyle and her friends survive a plane crash in the desolate Louisiana everglades, only to discover there's something way more dangerous lurking in the shallows.

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.
